name: AdGuard Home
author: InSpectre Community
description: Integrates with AdGuard Home REST API to pull known clients (device inventory with hostname resolution), DHCP leases, and DNS query logs for traffic analysis and suspicious domain alerting.

config_schema.label: AdGuard Home Host
config_schema.help: Base URL of your AdGuard Home web interface including port, e.g. http://192.168.0.2:3000. Do not include a trailing slash.

config_schema.label: Query Log Entries per Poll
config_schema.help: How many recent DNS query log entries to fetch each poll cycle. Recommended: 200–1000.

config_schema.label: Suspicious Domain Keywords
config_schema.default:
malware
phishing
tracker
botnet
cnc
c2
exploit
dynamic-dns
no-ip
duckdns
ddns
config_schema.help: One keyword per line. Any DNS query whose domain contains one of these strings will trigger a vuln.found event alert tagged 'suspicious-dns'. Case-insensitive substring match.

config_schema.label: Verify SSL Certificate
config_schema.help: Disable if your AdGuard Home instance uses a self-signed HTTPS certificate.

get_clients.description: Fetch all manually configured clients for device inventory and hostname resolution.

get_auto_clients.description: Fetch auto-discovered clients (from rDNS and /etc/hosts) not yet manually configured.

get_dhcp_leases.description: Fetch active (dynamic) DHCP leases from AdGuard Home. Only available when AdGuard Home's built-in DHCP server is enabled.

get_static_dhcp_leases.description: Fetch static (permanently assigned) DHCP leases from AdGuard Home.

get_all_dhcp_leases.description: Fetch both active and static DHCP leases in one call. Used for polling.

get_query_log.description: Fetch recent DNS query log for traffic analysis and suspicious domain detection.

get_stats.description: Fetch aggregate DNS statistics including top queried domains and top clients.

test_connection.description: Verify connectivity and credentials by fetching DNS general settings.

get_access_list.description: Fetch the current AdGuard Home access control list (allowed clients, disallowed clients, blocked hosts).

block_client.description: Block a client by appending their IP to AdGuard Home's disallowed_clients list. Reads the current list first so existing entries are preserved.

unblock_client.description: Unblock a client by removing their IP from AdGuard Home's disallowed_clients list. Reads the current list first so other blocked entries are preserved.
